name: 150+ Cinematic & Fantasy Photo Prompts
summary: 150+ Cinematic & Fantasy Photo Prompts is an extensive prompt collection designed to create epic, story-driven visuals inspired by cinema, fantasy worlds, and blockbuster-level storytelling.
description: This pack includes over 150 carefully structured prompts covering a wide range of cinematic genres — from fantasy and sci-fi to action, dystopian worlds, heroic sagas, and dramatic character-driven scenes. Each prompt is crafted to help generate images that feel like frames from a movie rather than standalone illustrations.
